items.caption: A pair of heavy-duty utility gloves, one black and one green, with the brand "ironclad" visible on the green glove. the gloves are laid out on a wooden surface, and the black glove is positioned slightly behind the green one. the gloves appear to be designed for durability and utility, possibly for use in a work environment or for outdoor activities. the background is neutral and does not distract from the gloves.

A pair of blue disposable plastic gloves against a white background. the gloves appear to be made of a thick, non-stick material, suitable for tasks that require protection against chemicals or heavy-duty work. the gloves are designed with reinforced fingertips and a snug fit at the wrist to prevent easy removal.
